title: stelis corniculata
intro: Stelis corniculata, also known as the horned orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stelis corniculata include treating various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves.
